thinking:
**Restoring Structure Modularity**

Okay, I've got it. I've noted that content associated with `activeTemperamentosTab` values 'PERFIL' and 'DISTRIBUICAO' was removed, and am developing a plan to restore it. I intend to do so more modularly, focusing on smaller code blocks to minimize errors. My immediate focus is on restoring the structure first.


**Reconstructing Removed Code**

I'm now diving into the specifics of the removed code block, particularly the content associated with 'PERFIL'. I'm aiming to understand its structure. I'm focusing on reconstructing it into smaller, manageable components. I'm noting the use of the `activeTemperamentosTab` variable to conditionally render different parts of the UI, and will ensure this logic is preserved and properly integrated into the renewed modularity. I'm also ensuring the original functionality, including the display of profile information and strengths/points of attention, is maintained, but now in a streamlined fashion.


**Analyzing UI Structure**

Okay, I'm now looking at the exact structure and functionality that needs restoring. I've taken a deep dive into the code block for the 'PERFIL' and 'DISTRIBUICAO' tabs, and I'm impressed with its elegance. This has helped me understand the conditional rendering based on `activeTemperamentosTab` and the associated logic within it. The components for profile display, including the 'Pontos de Atenção' and 'Ambiente Ideal' sections, are clearly defined, as is the distribution section. I am proceeding to re-implement, respecting the code's elegance.

args.Description: "Restaura as abas PERFIL e DISTRIBUICAO do modal de Temperamentos, integrando cantos retos de 5px (rounded-[5px]) e 3px (rounded-[3px]) nas barras de progresso, com ícones da Lucide para listagens."
args.Instruction: "Inserir e alinhar as abas de Perfil e Distribuição no modal de Temperamentos com os estilos atualizados de cantos de 5px."
args.ReplacementContent:
" return (
{activeTemperamentosTab === 'PERFIL' && (
{/* Profile Highlight Card */}
Perfil Predominante: {profileType}

{profile.name} - {profile.title}

{profileType}

{profile.description}

{/* Strengths & Attention & Ideal Environment */}
{/* Strengths */}
args.toolAction: "Restaurar e estilizar com cantos de 5px as abas de Perfil e Distribuição de Temperamentos"
